languages.text: "Я тоже не хочу столкнуться с древним врагом, кем бы он ни был. Как вам помочь?"
"I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"
languages.original_text: "Я тоже не хочу столкнуться с древним врагом, кем бы он ни был. Как вам помочь?"

traits.locale_text: "I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whoever it is, either. How can I help you?"
"I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"
"I have no desire to face this ancient evil, whatever it is, either. How can I help you?"
"I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whoever it is, either. How can I help you?"
"I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"

languages.text: 「この古の悪と対峙したいとは思わない。何であろうと。どうすれば助けることができる？」
languages.original_text: "I have no desire to face this ancient evil, whatever it is, either. How can I help you?"

traits.locale_text: 「この古の悪と対峙したいとは思わない。何であろうと。どうすれば助けることができる？」

languages.text: «No tengo ningún deseo de enfrentarme a este antiguo enemigo, sea quien sea. ¿Cómo puedo ayudarlos?».
languages.original_text: "I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"

traits.locale_text: «No tengo ningún deseo de enfrentarme a este antiguo enemigo, sea quien sea. ¿Cómo puedo ayudarlos?».

languages.text: “无论那是什么，我都无意直面那个古老宿敌。我该怎么帮你？”
languages.original_text: "I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"

traits.locale_text: “无论那是什么，我都无意直面那个古老宿敌。我该怎么帮你？”

languages.text: "Ich lege keinen Wert darauf, diesem alten Feind zu begegnen, wer er auch sein mag. Wie kann ich Euch helfen?"
languages.original_text: "I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich lege keinen Wert darauf, diesem alten Feind zu begegnen, wer er auch sein mag. Wie kann ich Euch helfen?"

languages.text: "Bu kadim düşman her kimse onunla yüzleşmeye hiç niyetim yok. Nasıl yardımcı olabilirim?"
languages.original_text: "I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu kadim düşman her kimse onunla yüzleşmeye hiç niyetim yok. Nasıl yardımcı olabilirim?"

languages.text: « Je n'ai moi-même aucune envie de faire face à cet ennemi ancien, quel qu'il soit. Comment puis-je vous aider ? »
languages.original_text: "I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai moi-même aucune envie de faire face à cet ennemi ancien, quel qu'il soit. Comment puis-je vous aider ? »
